title: Verify every staleness trigger
preconditions: A current retained outcome can be subjected independently to every transaction, relationship, allocation, category, contract, store-generation, snapshot, normalization, and rule-set change in the PRD.
steps: Apply each change independently; inspect and attempt apply; perform a same-identifier category rename as the non-stale control.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-OUTCOME-INVALIDATION holds: each semantic change names its fingerprint dimension and blocks apply, while a same-identity rename refreshes display only.
